name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES state, turn


(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                     /\ turn' = p
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                     /\ turn = p
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                     /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                     /\ turn' = turn
                     /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                     /\ turn' = turn
                     /\ state' = state

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, NULL, Values
VARIABLES store


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : 
       /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ \E k \in Keys: 
       /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES RetransmitCount, channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> -> [chunk \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> IF i*CHUNK_SIZE <= Len(file) THEN

            SubSeq(file, i*CHUNK_SIZE, i*CHUNK_SIZE + CHUNK_SIZE - 1)

            SubSeq(file, i*CHUNK_SIZE, Len(file))

            <<>>
    ]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : 
        /\ i \notin sent_chunks
        /\ \E msg \in {chunks[i], <<>>} : 
            /\ channel' = Append(channel, msg)
            /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, i)
            /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
    \/ \E i \in sent_chunks : 
        /\ \E msg \in {chunks[i], <<>>} : 
            /\ channel' = Append(channel, msg)
            /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, RetransmitCount(i) + 1)
    \/ \E i \in sent_chunks : 
        /\ RetransmitCount(i) >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, <<>>)
        /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \ {i}
        /\ retransmit_count' = RetransmitCount' \ {i}

RetransmitCount(i) ==

        RetransmitCount(i)

        0

RetransmitCount' ==

        RetransmitCount'(i)

        0

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Len(file) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sent_chunks \in Seq(1..Len(chunks))
    /\ retransmit_count \in Seq(1..Len(chunks))
    /\ channel \in Seq(Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE))
